name: Duffers Driving Range & Indoor Golf
about: Duffers Driving Range & Indoor Golf offers a customizable practice experience using Foresight GCQuad launch monitors, which are recognized as the most accurate in the industry. The facility provides fully customizable range sessions with adjustable parameters such as distance, green shape, elevation, and wind conditions. It hosts winter simulator leagues designed to help golfers maintain their swing during the off-season, providing a competitive environment with flexible scheduling and weekly prizes.
why_golfers_like_it: High-accuracy Foresight GCQuad launch monitors for detailed swing analysis
Fully customizable range experience with adjustable environmental factors
Winter leagues offering competitive play with flexible scheduling
Affordable pricing for simulator sessions and league participation

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-industry launch monitor with dozens of data points

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, though it does mention a pro shop, suggesting clubs may be accessible.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information about outside food or drink policies is provided.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Winter league sessions are 2 hours long, but standard 18-hole simulator time is not specified.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears family-friendly and offers leagues, though specific junior programs are not mentioned.
